nodes.name: Trigger: New Transcript File
nodes.notes: Watches for new demo transcript files in transcripts/demo/

body.system: You are a data extraction assistant. Extract business configuration from call transcripts. Return only valid JSON.

parameters.notes: Calls Claude API for intelligent extraction. Falls back to rule-based if unavailable.

nodes.name: Trigger: Onboarding Transcript
nodes.notes: Pipeline B: Watches for onboarding transcripts

parameters.jsCode:
const spec = generateAgentSpec($json.merged_memo, 'v2');
return [{ json: { spec, memo: $json.merged_memo, changes: $json.changes } }];

// Saves: memo.json, agent_spec.json, changes.json, changes.md
// All idempotent — hash-checked before overwrite

meta.description: Clara AI Pipeline A (Demo→v1) and Pipeline B (Onboarding→v2)
